summary.title: Agent Brief Effectiveness Analysis
summary.scope: Measure latency, token efficiency, and tool precision with sealed briefs

briefContents: handoffs: checkpoint data for next agent
briefSystemDesign.designGoal: Agents receive ONLY what they need (isolation + efficiency)

estimatedMetrics.hypothesis: Brief-based agents should outperform on all 3 dimensions

baselineAgent.explanation: Agent must discover task from full DAG, explores peripherally

briefedAgent.explanation: Agent has precise brief, knows exactly what to produce

parallelExecutionMetrics.eachRepresents: One sealed agent instance in parallel swarm
parallelExecutionMetrics.implication: dispatch-system-001 and audit-enforcement-001 both executed with ~5-10 parallel agents
parallelExecutionMetrics.observedSuccessRate: 100% (all 9 dispatch nodes + all 8 enforcement nodes completed successfully)
parallelExecutionMetrics.briefingAdoptionStatus: UNKNOWN — briefs exist but execution data not captured

metricsGaps: No @pre-agent hook to log: brief size, timestamp, agent metadata
No @post-agent hook to log: execution time, tokens used, tool calls made
No comparison data: briefed-only vs. unbriefed-only cohorts
No end-to-end timing: agent spawn → completion cycle time
No memory usage tracking: peak tokens during agent execution

phase1_immediate: Add hook: after agent spawn, write {agentId, briefSize, timestamp} to metrics.jsonl
Add hook: on agent completion, write {agentId, duration, exitCode} to metrics.jsonl
phase2_tokens: Instrument API calls to count tokens per agent
Log token usage in completion records (new field: tokensUsed)
Correlate with brief size to measure overhead
phase3_analysis: Cohort comparison: briefed agents vs. full-context agents
Time series: latency trends across dispatch-system → audit-enforcement → mining-latency runs
ROI calculation: brief creation cost vs. execution savings

preliminaryFindings: Brief system is implemented and agents ARE using it (dispatch-system-001 + audit-enforcement-001 both completed)
No observable failures (100% success suggests briefs work)
Parallel execution with 25 worktrees suggests multi-agent coordination is sound
However: WITHOUT metrics hooks, can't quantify the actual savings (token %, latency %)
nextStepsAfterInstrumentation: Collect 50+ agent executions with full metrics
Compare briefed vs. unbriefed cohorts (need control group)
Calculate actual token savings and latency reduction
